response.revised_prompt: IMG2IMG transform. Use the reference only for paperdoll stance logic: full-body front-facing RPG paperdoll, arms bent and hands open so weapons, shields, and tools can be overlaid later. Create an original Duskfell female base player-card paperdoll. Adult, modest non-explicit: simple linen chest wrap/bandeau, rough short underwrap or loincloth, bare feet. Strong old-school RPG sprite-paperdoll style, non-realistic, chunky simplified anatomy, hard pixel edges, visible pixel clusters, limited earthy palette, stepped shadows, flatter mannequin-like torso, simplified face, no glamor pose. Dark burgundy-to-black rectangular card backdrop. No UI buttons, no text, no watermark, no copied Ultima Online assets or exact character.
